name: daily-reflection-notebook
description: A mobile-first daily Markdown journal with AI-assisted reflection, deployable on Cloudflare Pages.

scripts.check: node --check src/worker.js && node --check functions/api/day/index.js && node --check functions/api/activity/index.js && node --check functions/api/review/index.js && node --check functions/api/search/index.js && node --check functions/api/export/index.js && node --check functions/api/tags/index.js
